put.description: Service to manage a single debt position, allowing to add, modify or delete one or more installments.

parameters.name: orgFiscalCode
parameters.description: the fiscal code of the organization

parameters.name: iud
parameters.description: The IUD of any installment of the debtPosition/paymentOption that will be managed by this operation

post.description: Request an instant payment operation, passing in input payment data, and receiving in output the url to trigger the payment operation.

parameters.name: orgFiscalCode
parameters.description: the fiscal code of the organization

post.description: Service to request a massive import operation. The upload of the file is done invoking the url returned by this service.

parameters.name: orgFiscalCode
parameters.description: the fiscal code of the organization

post.description: Service to request a massive export operation.

parameters.name: orgFiscalCode
parameters.description: the fiscal code of the organization

post.description: Service to request a massive export operation.

parameters.name: orgFiscalCode
parameters.description: the fiscal code of the organization

post.description: Service to create a single debt position.

parameters.name: orgFiscalCode
parameters.description: the fiscal code of the organization

parameters.description: the fiscal code of the organization

get.summary: get send legal fact download metadata
get.description: get send legal fact metadata for downloading document content

parameters.name: orgFiscalCode
parameters.description: the fiscal code of the organization

get.summary: request processing status of payment operation
get.description: Service to request the processing status of payment operation and the url to download output files (where applicable, based on processing status and export type).

parameters.name: orgFiscalCode
parameters.description: the fiscal code of the organization

parameters.name: idType
parameters.description: the type of identifier used to identify the payment operation

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: the identifier used to identify the payment

parameters.name: withReceiptBytes
parameters.description: if true, the response will contain the receipt bytes

get.summary: handle the payment of an already existing payment notice
get.description: Service to request the start of online payment of a payment notice, or alternatively the download of notice as PDF file; in input accepts the notice number, and if the notice is payable, returns the url to trigger the payment operation and the url to download the PDF notice file; if the notice is not payable, returns the reason of error.

parameters.name: orgFiscalCode
parameters.description: the fiscal code of the organization

parameters.name: nav
parameters.description: the notice number of the notice to pay

parameters.name: callbackUrl
parameters.description: If the nav is payable, this parameter is used to specify the url to redirect the navigation flow to, after completing the payment operation. If not set, a generic PU page will be used. The parameters paymentId and outcome (OK/KO) will be added to query string of url.

get.summary: request processing status of massive import operation
get.description: Service to request the processing status of massive import operation and the url to download output files (where applicable, based on processing status and import type).

parameters.name: orgFiscalCode
parameters.description: the fiscal code of the organization

get.summary: request processing status of export operation
get.description: Service to request the processing status of export operation and the url to download output files (where applicable, based on processing status and export type).

parameters.name: orgFiscalCode
parameters.description: the fiscal code of the organization

get.summary: retrieve the assessment data by payment reporting unique identifier
get.description: Service to retrieve the assessment data given the payment reporting id (IUF).

parameters.name: orgFiscalCode
parameters.description: the fiscal code of the organization

parameters.name: iuf
parameters.description: payment reporting unique identifier

get.summary: retrieve the assessment data by bill data
get.description: Service to retrieve the assessment data given the reporting id (IUF) or invoice data.

parameters.name: orgFiscalCode
parameters.description: the fiscal code of the organization

parameters.name: billYear
parameters.description: the year of the bill to retrieve the assessment data for

parameters.name: billNumber
parameters.description: the bill code to retrieve the assessment data for

get.summary: retrieve unpaid debt positions for a debtor
get.description: Service to retrieve unpaid debt positions for a specific debtor, optionally filtered by organization IPA code.

parameters.name: debtorFiscalCode
parameters.description: the fiscal code of the debtor

parameters.name: debtorEntityType
parameters.description: the entity type of the debtor

parameters.name: ipaCode
parameters.description: organization IPA code to filter results

get.summary: retrieve payment history for a debtor
get.description: Service to retrieve payment history (paid debt positions) for a specific debtor within a optional date range (default from today to the day after), optionally filtered by organization IPA code.

parameters.name: debtorFiscalCode
parameters.description: the fiscal code of the debtor

parameters.name: debtorEntityType
parameters.description: the entity type of the debtor

parameters.name: dateFrom
parameters.description: start date for payment history (ISO 8601 format)

parameters.name: dateTo
parameters.description: end date for payment history (ISO 8601 format)

parameters.name: ipaCode
parameters.description: organization IPA code to filter results

triggerPaymentUrl.description: the url to trigger the payment operation

downloadNoticeUrl.description: the url to download the payment notice as pdf file (not applicable to immediate payments)

paymentId.description: id to query payment operation status

callbackUrl.description: the url to redirect the navigation flow to, after completing the payment operation. If not set, a generic PU page will be used. The parameters paymentId and outcome (OK/KO) will be added to query string of url.

uploadUrl.description: The url to upload the file to, using a POST request with the file as body.

authorizationToken.description: The authorization token to be used in the upload request.

importPath.description: The path identifying the import operation.

paymentTriggerUrl.description: the url to trigger the payment operation

receiptDownloadUrl.description: the url to download the receipt as pdf file
